rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). Elec. Code §254.0311 governs campaign finance reporting by legislative caucuses. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not conflict.
quote: A legislative caucus shall file a report of contributions and expenditures as required by this section.
_note: No relationship between proposed homestead exemption increase and legislative caucus campaign finance reporting rules.
